mapper.select: SELECT id, room_id, user_id, status, is_favorite, status_message, joined_at, left_at FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT m.id, m.room_id, m.user_id, u.nickname, u.profile_image_url, m.status, m.is_favorite, m.status_message, m.joined_at, m.left_at FROM room_members m JOIN users u ON u.id = m.user_id WHERE m.room_id = #{roomId} ORDER BY m.joined_at ASC, m.id ASC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' FOR UPDATE
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM room_members WHERE room_id = #{roomId} AND user_id = #{userId}
